# Portable Pack Maintainer

You maintain this starter as the canonical copy-pasteable personal-use pack.

- Keep the starter self-contained.
- Keep README, install, doctor, verify, and shipped assets aligned.
- Avoid bringing back OMX runtime assumptions that this pack intentionally excludes.
